race.comment: KING OF WESSEX (1) was far too bad to be true last start when never running on Oakbank but his form prior reads very favourably for this. He loves the 2000m and draws to get the absolute A1 with Toeroek taking back over. Willing to completely forgive last start and trusting he's on song, he looks very hard to beat. TERRITORIAN (7) is proving frustrating for punters but is knocking on the door. Drawn sticky but the rise to 2000m looks a smart move. Bold showing anticipated. AITCH D'AMICO (3) is ticking along nicely and doesn't need to improve much to be getting involved at the end. RETOURNE (6) was a sharp improver at the latest in a positive change of tactics when making a mid-race move to lead them up into the straight. He fought hard when challenged but was claimed late. Peak fitness now and is worth following up.
